title: RealReal outlines 12–15% GMV growth for 2026 while advancing AI automation and supply initiatives
text: The RealReal's authentication model blends twelve patented processes with proprietary AI (Athena). Athena is automating the repetitive, data-driven parts of processing, authentication and cataloging, freeing authentication experts to focus on judgment-intensive work. The company has made significant progress on Athena deployment: exiting 2025 with 35% of all units fully flowing through Athena, and targeting nearly 50% of items processed through Athena by year-end 2026 to improve processing times, speed, and unit economics. An automated storage and retrieval system will be rolled out at the Perth Amboy authentication center, increasing capacity by 35% and throughput without new warehouse openings. Full-year 2026 outlook: GMV of $2.42-$2.47 billion (14%-16% growth), revenue of $770-$784 million (11%-13% growth), adjusted EBITDA expected at $59-$67 million with approximately 8.1% margin at midpoint. Continuous investment in AI-driven automation (Athena and other initiatives) is associated with ongoing reductions in processing costs per unit and streamlining authentication, enabling operational efficiencies that lower unit costs and support margin expansion and improved EBITDA.
